quoteCartSubtitle: Review below items and submit a quote request to discuss pricing, quantities, and terms with the seller.
buildQuoteText:
Search for products or browse the full list of eligible products to add to
your quote.
searchProductsEmpty:
Search for products or browse the full list of eligible products to add to
your quote.
searchFailed: Could not load products. Try again.
loginToViewQuoteHistory: Please log in to view your quote history or add products to cart to request a new quote.
confirmAcceptQuoteMessage: This will tell the seller that you agree with the current quote.
confirmDeclineQuoteMessage: This will tell the seller that you do not want to continue with this quote.
quoteStillNegotiating: This quote is still under negotiation.
quoteStatusUpdateFailed: Could not update this quote. Please refresh the page and try again.
chooseValidFiles: Please choose PNG, PDF, JPG, JPEG, DOC, or DOCX files.
messageSendFailed: Could not send message. Please try again.
quoteSubmitFailed: Could not send quote request. Please refresh the page and try again.
